svg.title: Synalux POS — seat management
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for seat management. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Tap a seat to view items | Drag items to reassign

Drag to a seat to assign
Classic Burger, Large Fries, Draft Beer
Assign to seats before processing payment
